Name: departments
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" ORDER BY (SELECT MAX("_cs_ob0"."joined_at") FROM "public"."user_departments" "_cs_ob0" WHERE "_cs_ob0"."department_id" = "public"."departments"."id") ASC NULLS FIRST) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."name" AS "name") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root"
